title: Vanilla PVP Edits
description: compact tools & shields, emissive ores, low fire, and more!
body:
[![Shields.io Modrinth Downloads Badge](https://img.shields.io/modrinth/dt/5Kz5frlc?color=00d845)](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/pvp)
[![Shields.io License Badge](https://img.shields.io/github/license/GeefireMC/VanillaPVP)](https://github.com/GeefireMC/VanillaPVP/blob/main/LICENSE)

# ⚔️ Vanilla PVP ⚔️

A minimally intrusive, Jappa-styled resource pack intended for PVP and competitive usage.

## Features

 💡 Emissive Ores! (requires [Continuity](https://modrinth.com/mod/continuity))
 
 ⛏️ Shorter Tool & Weapon Viewmodels!
 
 🏹 Colored Bow & Crossbow Stages!
 
 🧪 Unobtrusive Particles!
 
 🍎 Unobtrusive Food & Totems!
 
 🎃 Transparent Pumpkin & Spyglass Overlays!
 
 🎣 Transparent Fishing Rod Bobbers!

 💎 Transparent Crystals!
 
 📋 Transparent GUIs!
 
 🔥 Low Fire!
 
 🧮 ...And more to come!

## Configuration

This pack supports [Respackopts](https://modrinth.com/mod/respackopts) for configuration. Respackopts allows you to pick and choose what features you want to be enabled for the pack, without having to manually edit the pack files yourself. To use it, simply install Respackopts on your fabric client and configure this pack from the Resource Packs screen.

## Showcase (more images in the Gallery)

 ![Showcase of Vanilla PVP Edits 0.1.0](https://cdn-raw.modrinth.com/data/5Kz5frlc/images/ad38f6343645d22b2b1a0291f668434c979b33eb.png)

## Issues

 Please report any issues on the Github page.
